claims.text: The sampled opening frames contain the text "TURTLE CANYON COMEDY PRESENTS," and that text is identified as an opening production logo rather than a subsection heading, so it should not be counted as a titled subsection.
The sampled action/menu frames at 3-4s and 65-67s do not visibly show subsection title text, so those sampled visuals do not independently add confirmed subsection headings.

Separately from the sampled frames, the provided text context enumerates five subsection-style titles: "THE DRINKS," "THE BILL," "THE FART," "THE PREP," and "THE INTERROGATION." Counting those listed titles gives 5.
Among the answer choices, the count 5 maps directly to option B.
